tools.name: choose-resume-template
tools.description:
Resume Template Carousel & PDF Export Tool

This tool displays a carousel of professionally designed resume templates.
When the user clicks a template, they are redirected to an editor where
they can finalize their resume and download it as a PDF.

⚠️ CRITICAL: This is the ONLY way users can get downloadable resume files.

Use this tool whenever the user wants to:
- Modify or edit their resume (content or design)
- Apply a template or change the visual appearance
- Download their resume as PDF or any file format
- Export, save, or get a file version of their resume

⚠️ DO NOT create PDF files, Word documents, or any resume files yourself.
The user gets their downloadable file by clicking a template in this carousel.

When calling this tool:
- Pass the user's complete resume content exactly as provided
- Do not modify, skip, or paraphrase any sections
- After displaying the carousel, do not show the returned link to the user
- Tell them to click any template to download their resume as PDF

If the user asks for a "PDF version" or to "download" their resume,
use this tool - never create files yourself.
